Title: T001 - Repo scaffold & README
Description: Create repository scaffold, basic README, and contributing guide
Acceptance Criteria: Repo contains README with setup steps; contributing.md added; lint and format commands documented

Title: T002 - Initialize Next.js app
Description: Create Next.js app skeleton with TypeScript and ESLint/Prettier
Acceptance Criteria: `npm run dev` starts app; lint passes; TypeScript config present

Title: T003 - Supabase dev project
Description: Provision Supabase dev project and set up env secrets
Acceptance Criteria: Database and Auth accessible; `.env.local` example added

Title: T004 - CI pipeline (lint & tests)
Description: Add CI workflow that runs lint and tests on PRs
Acceptance Criteria: CI runs on PRs and reports status; lint step included

Title: T005 - Authentication (Supabase Auth)
Description: Integrate Supabase Auth for email + username sign-up/sign-in
Acceptance Criteria: Users can sign up and sign in; username stored and unique

Title: T006 - Recipe API (CRUD)
Description: Design DB schema for Recipe and implement CRUD endpoints
Acceptance Criteria: Create, read, update, delete recipes via API; schema migration added

Title: T007 - Recipe model & migrations
Description: Add SQL migration and ORM model for recipes
Acceptance Criteria: Migration file present; model maps to DB schema

Title: T008 - Recipe UI (create & view)
Description: Implement recipe create form and recipe view page
Acceptance Criteria: Form saves recipe; view page displays recipe and images

Title: T009 - Image uploads (storage)
Description: Implement image upload using chosen storage (Supabase or Cloudinary)
Acceptance Criteria: Images upload, store, and display with recipes

Title: T010 - Likes & Reviews
Description: Implement likes and reviews backend and UI
Acceptance Criteria: Users can like recipes and post reviews with optional images

Title: T011 - Moderation & Admin
Description: Add moderation queue, flagging, and Admin controls
Acceptance Criteria: Flagged items appear in moderator queue; Admin can remove content

Title: T012 - Trending & Related recommendations
Description: Implement basic trending algorithm and related suggestions
Acceptance Criteria: Trending list returns results; related recipes show on recipe page

Title: T013 - Search
Description: Add search index and search UI for recipes
Acceptance Criteria: Search returns relevant recipes with filters

Title: T014 - Recipe books (collections)
Acceptance Criteria: Users can create books and add/remove recipes

Title: T015 - End-to-end tests
Description: Add E2E tests for core flows (auth, create recipe, like, review)
Acceptance Criteria: E2E tests run in CI and pass consistently

Title: T016 - Polish & accessibility
Description: Run accessibility audit, performance tuning, and polish UI
Acceptance Criteria: A11y score improved; basic Lighthouse checks pass
